strategies.name: Quarterly Conditional
strategies.description: Quarterly rebalance (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec) when weights deviate beyond 20% threshold or cash drops below 5%.

strategies.name: Quarterly Force
strategies.description: Force rebalance to targets every quarter end (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec).

strategies.name: Monthly Conditional
strategies.description: Monthly rebalance when weights deviate beyond 20% threshold or cash drops below 5%.

strategies.name: Monthly Force
strategies.description: Force rebalance to targets every month end.

strategies.name: Quarterly Conditional + Trigger
strategies.description: Quarterly conditional rebalance plus emergency trigger at 10% single-stock price move.

strategies.name: Quarterly Force + Trigger
strategies.description: Quarterly force rebalance plus emergency trigger at 10% single-stock price move.

strategies.name: Monthly Conditional + Trigger
strategies.description: Monthly conditional rebalance plus emergency trigger at 10% single-stock price move.

strategies.name: Monthly Force + Trigger
strategies.description: Monthly force rebalance plus emergency trigger at 10% single-stock price move.
